content.speakerText: Gotta run, but let’s swap handles—text me yours?
content.speakerTextCn: 我得走了，咱们交换下账号吧？发我你的？
expectedAnswers: Sure! Mine's @myusername—DM me if you wanna chat!
Cool, I'll send it in a sec—ttyl!
I'm not comfortable sharing, but thanks for asking!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了交换账号的请求
语言准确性：是否正确使用了网络缩写（DM, ttyl）和语法
表达自然度：是否符合年轻人日常社交媒体对话风格
关键词覆盖：是否包含 handle, DM, ttyl 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I’ve got to head out, but let’s catch up soon!
content.speakerTextCn: 我得走了，但我们很快再聊吧！
expectedAnswers: Definitely! Let’s do a Zoom call next Friday.
Sounds good—I’ll slide into your DMs this weekend!
Absolutely! How about coffee next week?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否积极回应了‘下次再聊’的邀请
语言准确性：语法是否正确，是否使用自然口语表达
表达自然度：是否符合轻松友好的告别语境
关键词覆盖：是否包含 catch up, next week, DMs, Zoom 等关键词

content.speakerText: Alright, I’m off—let’s not let this be the last time!
content.speakerTextCn: 好了，我走了——别让这次变成最后一次！
expectedAnswers: No way! Let’s plan something next month—I’ve got your number.
Totally! I’ll text you about that event next week.
You’re right! Let’s make a group chat so we don’t lose touch.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确承诺后续互动，避免消极回应
语言准确性：是否使用了恰当的连接词和口语表达
表达自然度：是否语气真诚、符合朋友间告别语境
关键词覆盖：是否包含 next week, text, group chat, lose touch 等关键词
